essence: Prepares drinks and creates a welcoming atmosphere for guests.

identity.title: Bartender
identity.summary: Mixes and serves drinks, interacts with customers, and maintains a clean and organised bar.

salary.notes: Tips and high-end venues can significantly increase earnings.

qualifications: Ability to work in fast-paced environments

lifestyle.description: Bartenders work in pubs, bars, and restaurants, preparing drinks, serving customers, and managing busy shifts. The role suits sociable people who enjoy lively environments.
